creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Thu Oct  4 01:41:47 2012
New Revision: 305227
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/305227

Log:
  - Update to 3.4.0b2,1
  - Fix build with clang
  
  PR:		ports/172307
  Approved by:	maintainer (cy)

Added:
  head/sysutils/cfengine-devel/files/patch-src-files_select.c   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/sysutils/cfengine-devel/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/sysutils/cfengine-devel/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/sysutils/cfengine-devel/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/sysutils/cfengine-devel/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/cfengine-devel/Makefile	Wed Oct  3 22:23:20 2012	(r305226)
+++ head/sysutils/cfengine-devel/Makefile	Thu Oct  4 01:41:47 2012	(r305227)
@@ -6,8 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	cfengine
-PORTVERSION=	3.4.0a2
-PORTREVISION=	2
+PORTVERSION=	3.4.0b2
 PORTEPOCH=	1
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils
 PKGNAMESUFFIX=	-devel
@@ -32,6 +31,8 @@ USE_GMAKE=	yes
 DOCSDIR=	${PREFIX}/share/doc/cfengine
 CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--docdir=${DOCSDIR} \
 		--htmldir=${DOCSDIR}/html \
+		--libexecdir=${PREFIX}/libexec \
+		--libdir=${PREFIX}/libexec \
 		--mandir=${PREFIX}/man \
 		--with-workdir=/var/cfengine \
 		--with-pcre=${LOCALBASE} \

==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/cfengine-devel/distinfo	Wed Oct  3 22:23:20 2012	(r305226)
+++ head/sysutils/cfengine-devel/distinfo	Thu Oct  4 01:41:47 2012	(r305227)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (cfengine-3.4.0a2.tar.gz) = e718dd2842593c283c8797027f3fc5cb4223901575d16129411a680c83aeefcb
-SIZE (cfengine-3.4.0a2.tar.gz) = 8261427
+SHA256 (cfengine-3.4.0b2.tar.gz) = 5150125b56f1235e90b29fbe351a0d09b2148cdcf9ad2c78840d2ce08ff20999
+SIZE (cfengine-3.4.0b2.tar.gz) = 4671105

Added: head/sysutils/cfengine-devel/files/patch-src-files_select.c
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/sysutils/cfengine-devel/files/patch-src-files_select.c	Thu Oct  4 01:41:47 2012	(r305227)
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+--- src/files_select.c.orig	2012-10-03 17:59:39.000000000 +0000
++++ src/files_select.c	2012-10-03 18:00:44.000000000 +0000
+@@ -27,6 +27,7 @@
+ 
+ #include "env_context.h"
+ #include "files_names.h"
++#include "promises.h"
+ 
+ static int SelectTypeMatch(struct stat *lstatptr, Rlist *crit);
+ static int SelectOwnerMatch(char *path, struct stat *lstatptr, Rlist *crit);
